# pfsense_dynamic_dns (Data Source)

Retrieves a [dynamic DNS](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/services/dyndns/index.html) client entry by its index.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_dynamic_dns" "first" {
  id = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Numeric index of the dynamic DNS entry in pfSense configuration.

### Read-Only

- `curl_ipresolve_v4` (Boolean) Force IPv4 resolution for cURL.
- `curl_proxy` (String) HTTP proxy for cURL requests.
- `curl_ssl_verifypeer` (Boolean) Verify SSL peer certificate for cURL.
- `description` (String) Description of the dynamic DNS entry.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the dynamic DNS entry is disabled.
- `domain_name` (String) Domain name for the DNS record.
- `host` (String) Hostname to update.
- `interface` (String) Interface to monitor for IP changes.
- `max_cache_age` (String) Maximum cache age in seconds before forcing an update.
- `mx` (String) MX record hostname.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password or API key for the DNS provider.
- `proxied` (Boolean) Enable proxy mode (Cloudflare-specific).
- `request_interface` (String) Interface to use for sending update requests.
- `result_match` (String) Expected result match string (for custom DynDNS type).
- `ttl` (String) TTL for the DNS record.
- `type` (String) Dynamic DNS service type.
- `update_url` (String) Custom update URL (for custom DynDNS type).
- `username` (String, Sensitive) Username or API token for the DNS provider.
- `verbose_log` (Boolean) Enable verbose logging.
- `wildcard` (Boolean) Enable wildcard DNS entry.
- `zone_id` (String) Zone ID (Cloudflare-specific).
